_proposal_note: PROPOSAL — not yet adopted. The repo already follows shadcn architectural patterns (cva, cn, owned components in src/components/ui/*, lucide, semantic Tailwind tokens) on a Base UI primitive layer (@base-ui-components/react). This file declares those choices in the shape the shadcn CLI expects, so a future `npx shadcn@latest add <name> --base base-ui` can install missing primitives against the canonical base-vega registry instead of hand-rolling. Do NOT run the shadcn CLI without first confirming the install will not overwrite the existing Base UI variants of button.tsx / dialog.tsx / drawer.tsx / etc. See /dev/design for context.
